rules.rationale: Margin level proxies pricing power and business model quality.
Stable margins indicate durable economics rather than one-off swings.
Scale correlates with resilience and institutional interest.

Short-term liquidity buffer.
Ability to service debt from operating profit.

Profit that never becomes cash is the classic earnings-quality failure.

top.title: Negative operating cash flow in FY24

flags.detail: (PAT − CFO)/Total assets = 13.4%; reported profit substantially exceeds operating cash (strongest single manipulation predictor in Beneish's work).
Sales grew 1.92x in the latest year; Beneish notes extreme growth firms face pressure that predicts manipulation. Verify sustainability.
PAT grew 421% vs revenue 92% in the latest pre-IPO year — margin expansion this sharp just before listing warrants scrutiny (dressing-up risk).

verdict: Mixed fundamentals · Valuation indeterminate · moderate risk profile
